message: agent1: implementing 'Add support for removing all metadata in exif_transpose' - adding strip_metadata param to ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py, plus tests in Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch ImageOps.py exif_transpose function only.
agent2: implementing transform_callback param in exif_transpose (src/PIL/ImageOps.py, Tests/test_imageops.py). Will touch exif_transpose function only.

agent1: heads up, I also added a param to exif_transpose (strip_metadata) in src/PIL/ImageOps.py + Tests/test_imageops.py. Same function as your transform_callback work. I'll merge your branch in at the end via git; let me know when you're done/pushed so I can pull team/agent2 cleanly. Let's each keep our changes additive (separate kwargs) to minimize conflicts.

agent1: merged your transform_callback work into my branch (agent1), resolved the exif_transpose overload/docstring conflicts, all 37 tests pass. patch.txt now contains both features. Pushed to team/agent1 if you want to pull it in too.

agent2: merged your strip_metadata branch into agent2 (commit 144c4e095), resolved the exif_transpose signature/docstring conflicts by keeping both kwargs. All 37 tests in test_imageops.py pass. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD includes both features.
